title: Race Start
prompt: We're racing. The work that went into this — setup, qualifying, pace — gets tested right now. Survive lap one.

title: Big Save
prompt: Nearly lost it. The car pushed past the limit and demanded immediate correction. Feel that feedback.

title: Position Lost
prompt: {behind} found a way through. One position lost in the race — the math just got harder but it's not over. Respond now.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Got through. That's a position gained and every one counts in this race. Keep pushing.

title: Yellow Flag
prompt: Caution flag. Something happened and the race has paused itself — this changes the calculation completely. Race on.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Position up. One position at a time is how you build a race and that's one closer to the goal. Keep pushing.

title: Personal Best Lap
prompt: Best lap set. That lap felt fast and the timer confirms it — build on this feeling. There's more.
